content:
MODULE: cosmos.agents.planner_agent
FILE: cosmos/agents/planner_agent.py (1476 lines)
CATEGORY: agents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Planner Agent - Task Decomposition & Orchestration

Novel Approaches:
1. Hierarchical Task Networks - Multi-level task breakdown
2. Dependency Graph - Automatic dependency detection
3. Progress Monitoring - Real-time status tracking
4. Dynamic Replanning - Adapt to failures and changes

CLASSES:
- ReplanTrigger: Conditions that trigger automatic replanning.

Dynamic replanning allows plans t
- ReplanEvent: Record of a replanning event.
- PlanHealth: Health metrics for a plan.
  Methods: def overall_health(self) -> float
- TaskStatus(Enum)
- TaskPriority(Enum)
- SubTask: A single task in the plan.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- Plan: A complete plan with tasks and structure.
  Methods: def get_progress(self) -> float
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- PlannerAgent: Intelligent task planning and orchestration agent.

Features:
- Breaks complex g
  Methods: async def create_plan(self, goal: str, context: Optional[str]=None, constraints: Optional[list[str]]
  Methods: async def execute_plan(self, plan_id: str, agent_executor: Optional[Callable]=None) -> Plan
  Methods: async def add_task(self, plan_id: str, title: str, description: str, depends_on: Optional[list[str]]
  Methods: async def cancel_task(self, plan_id: str, task_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def get_plan_status(self, plan_id: str) -> Optional[dict]
  Methods: def get_dependency_graph(self, plan_id: str) -> Optional[dict]
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
  Methods: def add_replan_trigger(self, trigger: ReplanTrigger)
